message:
test(core): expand async-core(+152), graphql(+111), oauth(+96), bootstrap(+87) tests

fcp-async-core: 104→256 tests. Comprehensive sync tests for AsyncError,
sync primitives (Mutex, RwLock, Semaphore), channels, CancellationToken,
Deadline, ExecutionContext, Runtime, and all error types.

fcp-graphql: 250→361 tests across 7 files. Expanded error, operation,
client, schema, subscription, retry, and pagination modules.

fcp-oauth: 293→389 tests across 7 files. Added grant types, PKCE
verification, token management, OAuth1 encoding, OAuth2 flows, and
provider-specific endpoint coverage.

fcp-bootstrap: 347→434 tests across 8 files. Expanded error, genesis,
phase, ceremony, recovery_phrase, cold_recovery, hardware_token, and
time_validation modules.

All clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
